prediction.reasoning: Based on Disney's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, 7-day price movements typically follow a normal distribution with standard deviation around 2.5-3% of current price. The point estimate assumes slight positive momentum given recent streaming improvements and park recovery trends. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty bands using standard statistical multipliers (0.67, 1.28, 1.65) applied to estimated weekly volatility of ~$2.40.
